items.title: As Home Depot Stock Nears Breakout, Here's A Bullish Option Play
items.description: Home Depot is putting in a nice series of higher highs and higher lows as the stock recovers from its late-2025 swoon.  Traders might consider taking some bullish exposure on Home Depot stock using options in a limited-risk way.  Assume we have a price target of 405 for Home Depot within the next few weeks.
